about.title: About
about.subtitle: Bringing Ancient Egypt to Life Through AI Technology
about.missionText: EgyGuide is an innovative AI-powered platform designed to make ancient Egyptian history accessible and engaging for everyone. By combining cutting-edge computer vision and natural language processing, we transform how people explore and learn about Egypt's magnificent artifacts and rich cultural heritage.
about.university: Zewail City University of Science and Technology
about.projectDesc: This project represents the culmination of our studies in AI and machine learning, combining theoretical knowledge with practical application to solve real-world challenges in cultural heritage preservation and education.
about.teamIntro: A passionate group of students dedicated to bridging technology and history
about.feature1Desc: Instantly identify Egyptian artifacts using advanced computer vision and deep learning models trained on thousands of historical objects.
about.feature2Desc: Engage in natural conversations with our AI guide powered by large language models fine-tuned on Egyptian history and culture.
about.feature3Desc: Access detailed historical context, timelines, and cultural significance for every artifact and monument in our database.
about.techDesc: Built with modern AI technologies and frameworks
about.universityName: Zewail City of Science and Technology
about.universityAddress: Ahmed Zewail Road, October Gardens, 6th of October City, Giza, Egypt
about.contactMessageText: We welcome feedback, collaboration opportunities, and questions about EgyGuide. Whether you're an educator, historian, or technology enthusiast, we'd love to hear from you.
about.contactClosing: This project is part of our ongoing commitment to using artificial intelligence for cultural preservation and education.
about.footerTagline: Bridging the ancient and the modern through AI
